evals.prompt: Run an SEO audit on the homepage.
evals.expected_output: Should check meta tags, headings, content, technical SEO, and structured data, then produce a report with scores per category

assertions.text: Checks meta tags (title, description, canonical, OG, Twitter Card)
Checks heading hierarchy (one H1, no level skips)
Produces a report with status per category

evals.expected_output: Should check LCP, FID, CLS, TTFB, FCP against target values and report the performance checklist

assertions.text: Lists Core Web Vitals with target values (LCP <2.5s, FID <100ms, CLS <0.1)
Checks image optimization (format, lazy loading, dimensions)
Checks JavaScript bundle size and code splitting

evals.prompt: The SEO audit found issues. Fix them all.
evals.expected_output: Should propose specific fixes and wait for confirmation before applying

assertions.text: Proposes specific changes for each issue

evals.prompt: Run both SEO and performance audits on the blog page.
evals.expected_output: Should run both checklists and check for structured data (Article schema for blog)

assertions.text: Checks for Schema.org Article structured data
